data.title: Pinnacle West to release 2025 Q3 financial results on Nov 3, 2025, before US markets open.
data.description: Pinnacle West Capital Corp., based in Phoenix, is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Monday, November 3. The report will be made public before the opening of U.S. financial markets on that day.

data.title: EQT Corp (NYSE: EQT) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 21, host conference call to discuss further details.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, EQT Corporation announced it will disclose its third quarter financial and operating results after the market closes on October 21, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as EQT, intends to conduct a conference call for investors to discuss the outcomes and pertinent issues.

data.title: GrafTech (NYSE:EAF) to host Q3 2025 Earnings Call on Oct 24 at 10:00am (EDT) to discuss financial results.
data.description: GrafTech International Ltd., listed on NYSE as EAF, is set to conduct its Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on October 24, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). During this event, senior management will review the financial performance for the third quarter that concluded on September 30, 2025, along with discussing ongoing business strategies. The detailed financial report is scheduled to be disclosed before the market opens on October 24, 2025, and interested parties can access this information through the investor relations webpage.

data.title: CF Industries sends low-carbon ammonia to Envalior through Trafigura, with 23,500 metric tons loaded for shipment.
data.description: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. made known that a shipment of certified low-carbon ammonia, produced at its Donaldsonville, Louisiana facility, was sent out. Trafigura, a major player in global commodities, procured the ammonia for delivery to Envalior, a top Engineering Materials firm. Envalior plans to employ the low-carbon ammonia for manufacturing low-carbon caprolactam. As part of this transaction, Trafigura loaded 23,500 metric tons of ammonia for transportation.
Fed discount-window loans $7.17b in week ended October 1st after $7.82b.

data.title: Traditional finance embraces crypto: Tether raises $X, SEC looks into onchain stocks, JPMorgan expands Kinexys, biotech bets treasury on DePIN.
data.description: Traditional finance institutions are increasingly getting involved in the world of cryptocurrency. Tether recently raised a significant amount of funds. The SEC is closely monitoring the trading of stocks on blockchain platforms. JPMorgan is expanding its Kinexys platform. Additionally, a biotech company made a bold move by investing their treasury funds in DePIN. This demonstrates the growing interest and adoption of crypto within the traditional financial sector.

data.title: Taos town selects The Abbi Agency as PR/marketing agency of record after a year of growth. Specializes in travel & tourism.
data.description: After a period of significant expansion and the introduction of new services in New Mexico, The Abbi Agency, a marketing and public relations firm focused on travel and tourism, has been selected for the roles of marketing, branding, and public relations. This decision comes after a successful year of growth for the agency, as it continues to establish its presence in Taos, N.M. The selection signifies the agency's progress and adaptability in the industry.

data.title: Billionaire Arthur Hayes predicts European Central Bank issues will raise BTC value.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.3% in 2021, which is a significant increase from the previous estimate of 4.0%. This boost is mainly due to the faster-than-expected recovery in advanced economies, particularly the United States and China. However, the recovery for many emerging market and developing economies is expected to be slower and more uneven. The global economy is also forecasted to expand by 4.5% in 2022. Despite these positive trends, the report warns of ongoing risks, including the uneven distribution of vaccines and the potential for new COVID-19 variants. Amidst these uncertainties, global growth remains vital for reducing poverty and improving livelihoods worldwide.

data.title: Advisor.com secures $9M seed round from Walkabout Ventures and Jim Brown, boosting growth prospects.
data.description: A financial services company, Advisor.com, has recently disclosed securing a substantial $9 million seed funding round. The investment was spearheaded by Walkabout Ventures, showcasing considerable confidence in the potential of Advisor.com. This injection of funds is anticipated to fuel growth and development initiatives within the company, bolstering its position in the industry.

data.title: Perfect Corp. introduces update to Virtual Try-On for Glasses with 13,000+ SKUs, essential for brands launching virtual try-on experiences.
data.description: In New York, Perfect Corp., a prominent AI and AR beauty and fashion tech company known for its 'Beautiful AI' solutions, has revealed a significant enhancement to its Virtual Glasses Try-On Online Service. The update showcases a vast digital collection of over 13,000 glasses products, offering brands quick access to a wide range of items. This addition aims to simplify the onboarding process for brands and speed up the introduction of virtual try-on features. The platform now includes New In-Platform Glasses for a more enhanced user experience.

data.title: Myers Industries announces conference call for 2025 third quarter results in Akron, Ohio.
data.description: Akron, Ohio - Myers Industries has revealed that they will be announcing their third-quarter results for 2025 on a specific date. Additionally, the company will be hosting a conference call to discuss these results. This announcement signifies an important milestone for Myers Industries and reflects their commitment to transparency and communication with stakeholders. The conference call is expected to attract a significant number of participants eager to learn about the company's performance during the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Oak Valley Community Bank opens 19th branch in Lodi, CA at 31 South School Street with full services. Mon-Fri, 9AM-5PM.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), opened its nineteenth full-service branch in Downtown Lodi at 31 South School Street. The new branch provides personal and commercial banking services, including a walk-up ATM and night deposit facility for customer convenience. Operating hours are from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on weekdays.

data.title: Agroz Inc. closes IPO on NASDAQ (AGRZ) in Malaysia, becoming fully integrated agri-tech company.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, as of October 2, 2025, Agroz Inc. (NASDAQ: AGRZ), an advanced agricultural technology firm, is engaged in developing indoor Controlled Environment Agriculture solutions. Agroz is known for its vertically integrated approach in designing, constructing, and running these agricultural facilities.

data.title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) to release third quarter 2025 earnings on Oct 29, with a conference call on Oct 30 at 1:00 PM ET.
data.description: Arlington-based real estate company AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) is set to announce its third quarter 2025 earnings on October 29, 2025, following the market closure. The company has scheduled a conference call for October 30, 2025, at 1:00 PM Eastern Time (ET) to discuss the results. For those interested in participating, the conference call can be accessed domestically at (877) 407-9716 and internationally at (201) 493-6779. Additionally, a webcast of the call will be available at https://investors.avalonbay.com. For those who miss the live call, a replay will be available domestically at (844) 51.

data.title: Keller Williams recognized among America's Most Admired Workplaces 2026 by Newsweek for culture, talent engagement.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Keller Williams, known as KW, has been acknowledged for its excellence in culture, talent engagement, and inspiration. Their exceptional standards have earned them recognition in these areas.
